title: Citrusy Gooey Irish Turnips Stew
description: A slow-cooked, plant-based-friendly stew that combines the flavors of Ireland with a hint of citrus, perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: Beer (gluten-free)
ingredients.notes: such as Guinness or Murphy's Irish Stout

instructions: In a large Dutch oven or pot, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped thyme and rosemary, and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the turnips, potato, and carrot, and cook for 5 minutes, until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the lemon and orange juice, and stir to combine.
Add the beer and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the turnips and vegetables are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs and a side of crusty bread, if desired.
